title: Meknes, Fès-Meknès — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Meknes, Fès-Meknès: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Meknes is a city in Fès-Meknès with a population of 520,000. An imperial city with grand gates and historic monuments, offering a quieter alternative to nearby Fes.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
